title: Gilly Pack
description: Gilly Pack - is a unique resource pack that changes only UI of Minecraft, match the vanilla style of minecraft and makes it more fresh and dark.
body:
![Start Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80cc9da219581ee1cc8ce88c644c5e0dcdba09d3.png)


### Gilly Pack - is a unique resource pack that changes only UI of Minecraft, match the vanilla style of minecraft and makes it more fresh and dark.

**You can write to me with any questions in Discord - 0goose0**

**Or in [Telegram](https://t.me/Moji363)**

**Also, if you find any bug or malfunction, please write a [Report](https://github.com/Goose-42/GillyPack/issues).**

_**This resource pack was inspired by [Mandala's GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mandalas-gui-dark-mode)**_
